This duplication grows linearly with each RP25 pack and increases drift risk over time. There is no correctness impact for CP00-760: all required checks (descriptor-only, runtime-closed, no sensitive payloads, deny-over-allow, no cross-tenant, no audit body, Hermes/Claude gate, handoff binding, authority boundary) are present and uniformly enforced, and the 16/16 test suite exercises them.","recommendation":"Optionally parameterize the shared coverage/descriptor validation into a single factory keyed by binding+requirements (and similarly for the service builders) to reduce future drift.
